Detailed_Feedback: The app utilizes GoRouter effectively for navigation. Screens adapt well to the mobile form factor. State management via Provider is smooth and handles loading states correctly.
Most forms have standard validation. However email validation uses a simple '@' check and passwords only check minimum length.
Action_Items: Enhance RegExp for email validation and add password complexity rules.

Detailed_Feedback: Almost all user flows are wired up correctly with the exception of 'Forgot Password'.
Action_Items: Wire up the Forgot Password button with SupabaseService.resetPassword().

Detailed_Feedback: Foreign keys and data structures for users vehicles bookings payments and reviews are optimally designed.
All tables currently have RLS disabled exposing the entire database to anyone with the anon key.
Action_Items: CRITICAL: Enable RLS on all 6 tables and write appropriate access policies immediately before production.

Detailed_Feedback: Online payments are simulated without any actual gateway verification. Transactions are marked as successful locally.
Action_Items: Integrate a real payment gateway (Razorpay/Stripe) and use webhooks/edge functions for secure verification.

Detailed_Feedback: Supabase Authentication correctly integrated. User sessions are persisted and profile creation triggers correctly on signup.
The platform is functionally complete from A to Z for a beta/demo environment but requires critical security and payment integrations before public launch.
Action_Items: 1. Fix RLS 2. Add Payment Gateway 3. Secure environment variables 4. Fix async gap context issue.
